rationale.R1.2: The revised draft addresses the identified issues and improves logical consistency by clearly stating the contribution and ordering the information logically.
rationale.RX.1: The agent provides detailed notes on each issue and suggests revisions that improve clarity and accuracy, disclosing uncertainty where appropriate.
rationale.RX.3: The agent identifies multiple scope-related issues and provides clear guidance for improvement, ensuring adherence to the agreed scope.
rationale.RX.4: The agent avoids introducing new errors or harmful content while making substantial improvements to the original text.
rationale.RX.5: The agent traces all non-cosmetic changes with detailed explanations of the rationale behind each modification.
